name: claude-usage-cost
description: Claude rate-limit usage + equivalent API cost indicator in the VS Code status bar. Shows S：82% · 1h 12m · $0.00 format.

commands.title: Claude Usage: Switch Display Mode (Session / Weekly / Both)

enumDescriptions: Show both session and weekly windows
claudeUsageCost.displayMode.description: Display mode for the Claude Usage Cost status bar item.

claudeUsageCost.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval (seconds) for refreshing Claude rate-limit data. Default 60s, minimum 30s. Random jitter up to 20% of the interval is added each tick. Changes take effect immediately.

claudeUsageCost.cost.display.description: Display cost in status bar: 'today' shows today's total cost in local timezone, 'off' hides cost entirely.

claudeUsageCost.cost.localRefreshSeconds.description: Interval in seconds to scan local jsonl usage logs for cost updates. Low-overhead local I/O, does not trigger network requests.

claudeUsageCost.cost.pricing.remoteUrl.description: Optional HTTPS URL to fetch pricing table updates. Leave empty to use bundled pricing only. When set, the URL is fetched every 24h and cached locally. Query strings are stripped from logs to avoid leaking tokens.

claudeUsageCost.weeklyCostPanel.days.description: Number of recent days to show in the 'Show Weekly Cost' panel. Select 'all' to include every day with recorded usage, grouped by month (one table per month).

claudeUsageCost.thresholds.warning.description: Utilization percentage (0-100) at which the status bar turns warning color (yellow). Default: 80.

claudeUsageCost.thresholds.error.description: Utilization percentage (0-100) at which the status bar turns error color (red). Default: 95. Should be greater than thresholds.warning; if not, the extension falls back to defaults.
